global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with bold text elements promoting a new season.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to install the app for new seasonal content.

elements.label: red abstract background
elements.description: A vibrant red background with abstract shapes and gradients creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: The logo features bold, stylized text reading 'StarVault' in a prominent position at the top.

elements.label: New season drops
elements.description: A bold, white headline stating 'A new season drops' positioned centrally, conveying excitement.

elements.label: Start free today
elements.description: A smaller white text below the headline that reads 'Start free today', inviting action.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Install now' in white, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: Various abstract shapes in lighter shades of red and pink scattered throughout the background.

elements.label: top left element
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned at the top left, adding to the abstract design.

elements.label: bottom left element
elements.description: A small oval shape located towards the bottom left, contributing to the overall aesthetic.

elements.label: bottom right element
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned at the bottom right, enhancing the abstract theme.

elements.label: center element
elements.description: A square shape in the center, adding visual interest to the composition.

elements.label: bottom decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element at the bottom, providing balance to the layout.

elements.label: promotional text
elements.description: Text at the bottom stating 'A new season drops Start free today', emphasizing the promotional offer.
elements.text_content: new season drops Start free today

elements.label: StarVault headline
elements.description: The prominent 'StarVault' text at the top, designed to catch the viewer's attention.

elements.label: Install now text
elements.description: A call-to-action text 'Install now' at the bottom, encouraging immediate action.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline and body text in the center, with the CTA button at the bottom.
